title: elaphoglossum repandum
intro: Elaphoglossum repandum, also known as the lesser shield fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum repandum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
